official_skills.title: Common Errors & Solutions
official_skills.description: Diagnose and fix common errors encountered when building on Solana, including GLIBC issues, Anchor version conflicts, and RPC errors.

official_skills.title: Version Compatibility Matrix
official_skills.description: Reference table for matching Anchor, Solana CLI, Rust, and Node.js versions to avoid toolchain conflicts.

official_skills.title: Confidential Transfers
official_skills.description: Implement private, encrypted token balances on Solana using the Token-2022 confidential transfers extension.

official_skills.title: Frontend with framework-kit
official_skills.description: Build React and Next.js Solana apps with a single client instance, Wallet Standard-first connection, and minimal client-side footprint.

official_skills.title: IDL & Client Code Generation
official_skills.description: Generate type-safe program clients from IDLs using Codama, eliminating hand-maintained serializers across languages.

official_skills.title: Kit ↔ web3.js Interop
official_skills.description: Patterns for bridging @solana/kit and legacy @solana/web3.js at adapter boundaries while migrating incrementally.

official_skills.title: Payments & Commerce
official_skills.description: Build checkout flows, payment buttons, and QR-based payment requests using Commerce Kit. Note: Solana Pay has been discontinued.

official_skills.title: Programs with Anchor
official_skills.description: Write Solana programs using the Anchor framework for fast iteration, automatic account validation, and built-in TypeScript client generation.

official_skills.title: Programs with Pinocchio
official_skills.description: Build high-performance Solana programs with zero-copy techniques and minimal dependencies, without the solana-program overhead.

official_skills.title: Curated Resources
official_skills.description: Authoritative Solana learning platforms, documentation, tooling references, and community resources.

official_skills.title: Security Checklist
official_skills.description: Program and client security checklist covering account validation, signer checks, and common attack vectors to review before deploying.

official_skills.title: Surfpool Cheatcodes
official_skills.description: Full reference for all surfnet_* RPC methods to manipulate time, accounts, and programs in a local Surfpool network during testing.

official_skills.title: Surfpool
official_skills.description: A drop-in replacement for solana-test-validator with sub-second startup, automatic mainnet state cloning, transaction profiling, and a built-in web UI.

official_skills.title: Testing Strategy
official_skills.description: A testing pyramid for Solana programs using LiteSVM for fast unit tests, Mollusk for isolated instruction checks, and Surfpool for integration tests with realistic state.

official_skills.title: @solana/kit Reference
official_skills.description: Comprehensive guide to @solana/kit — the modular, tree-shakable JavaScript SDK for Solana covering accounts, codecs, Codama codegen, plugins, React integration, and program interaction.

community_skills.title: QEDGen — Formal Verification
community_skills.description: Spec-driven verification for Solana programs. Write a .qedspec (one file or split across handler/interface files), then qedgen check validates it and qedgen codegen generates Lean 4 proofs, Kani harnesses, proptests, and CI — covering authorization, conservation, state machines, CPI correctness, and arithmetic safety. qedgen verify runs the generated harnesses end-to-end. Leanstral + Aristotle fill hard proof sub-goals.

skill_md:
# Solana Agent Skills

> Foundation-maintained skills for AI agents building on Solana.
> Install any skill: `npx skills add <url>`

## Install All Skills

```
npx skills add https://github.com/solana-foundation/solana-dev-skill
```

## Skills

### Common Errors & Solutions
Diagnose and fix common errors encountered when building on Solana, including GLIBC issues, Anchor version conflicts, and RPC errors.
- **Category**: Reference

### Version Compatibility Matrix
Reference table for matching Anchor, Solana CLI, Rust, and Node.js versions to avoid toolchain conflicts.
- **Category**: Tooling

### Confidential Transfers
Implement private, encrypted token balances on Solana using the Token-2022 confidential transfers extension.
- **Category**: Tokens

### Frontend with framework-kit
Build React and Next.js Solana apps with a single client instance, Wallet Standard-first connection, and minimal client-side footprint.
- **Category**: Frontend

### IDL & Client Code Generation
Generate type-safe program clients from IDLs using Codama, eliminating hand-maintained serializers across languages.
- **Category**: Tooling

### Kit ↔ web3.js Interop
Patterns for bridging @solana/kit and legacy @solana/web3.js at adapter boundaries while migrating incrementally.
- **Category**: Tooling

### Payments & Commerce
Build checkout flows, payment buttons, and QR-based payment requests using Commerce Kit. Note: Solana Pay has been discontinued.
- **Category**: Payments

### Programs with Anchor
Write Solana programs using the Anchor framework for fast iteration, automatic account validation, and built-in TypeScript client generation.
- **Category**: Programs

### Programs with Pinocchio
Build high-performance Solana programs with zero-copy techniques and minimal dependencies, without the solana-program overhead.
- **Category**: Programs

### Curated Resources
Authoritative Solana learning platforms, documentation, tooling references, and community resources.
- **Category**: Reference

### Security Checklist
Program and client security checklist covering account validation, signer checks, and common attack vectors to review before deploying.
- **Category**: Security

### Surfpool Cheatcodes
Full reference for all surfnet_* RPC methods to manipulate time, accounts, and programs in a local Surfpool network during testing.
- **Category**: Tooling

### Surfpool
A drop-in replacement for solana-test-validator with sub-second startup, automatic mainnet state cloning, transaction profiling, and a built-in web UI.
- **Category**: Tooling

### Testing Strategy
A testing pyramid for Solana programs using LiteSVM for fast unit tests, Mollusk for isolated instruction checks, and Surfpool for integration tests with realistic state.
- **Category**: Testing
